text: Birds chirping in a forest with rustling leaves and a distant stream
Busy city intersection with car horns, engine noise, and pedestrian chatter
Kitchen sounds with sizzling oil, chopping on a cutting board, and running water
Rain falling on a tin roof with occasional thunder in the distance
Children playing in a playground with laughter, swings creaking, and balls bouncing
A dog barking repeatedly followed by a door opening and closing
Waves crashing on a beach with seagulls calling overhead
An acoustic guitar being strummed slowly with occasional finger picking
Office environment with keyboard typing, phone ringing, and muffled conversation
A train approaching and passing through a station with braking sounds and announcements
